_meta.note: Snapshot of Phase 3 Knowledge Base seed data — captured before architectural adjustments. Reflects migration 005 content. If you have made edits since running migration 005, download the live table data from Supabase Dashboard > Table Editor > Export before applying migration 006.

kb_icp_segments.definition: Leagues, tournaments, and event organizers that own commercial sponsorship rights to sports or esports properties.
kb_icp_segments.criteria: Entity must own or operate a sports/esports property with sponsorship inventory to sell.
kb_icp_segments.example_companies: DFL, BLAST, Esports World Cup, Volleyball World, Pro League, Niké League, The Icon League
kb_icp_segments.pain_points: Need to prove sponsor ROI for renewals, Manual reporting takes weeks, Sponsors demand cross-channel measurement
kb_icp_segments.target_titles: Commercial Director, Head of Partnerships, Head of Sponsorship, VP Commercial, Head of Sponsorship Sales

kb_icp_segments.definition: Companies actively spending on sponsorship deals in sports or esports who need to measure ROI.
kb_icp_segments.criteria: Brand must have at least one active sponsorship relationship in sports or esports.
kb_icp_segments.example_companies: Vodafone, Visit Qatar, betting brands, energy drinks, gaming peripherals brands
kb_icp_segments.pain_points: Can't prove ROI to leadership, Activation spend is opaque, Multi-channel exposure is unmeasured
kb_icp_segments.target_titles: Head of Brand Partnerships, Sponsorship Manager, VP Marketing, Head of Sports Marketing, Head of Brand

kb_icp_segments.definition: Marketing, sponsorship, or media agencies that manage sports/esports campaigns on behalf of brand or rights holder clients.
kb_icp_segments.criteria: Agency must have sports or esports clients for whom they manage sponsorships or brand activation.
kb_icp_segments.example_companies: Sportfive, Havas, WPP Media, Freaks4U, OMG
kb_icp_segments.pain_points: Slow client reporting, Manual data aggregation, Hard to prove agency value
kb_icp_segments.target_titles: Managing Partner, Head of Strategy, Director of Sponsorship, Head of Sports & Entertainment

kb_icp_segments.definition: Sports clubs or esports organizations with their own commercial and sponsorship operations.
kb_icp_segments.criteria: Club must have at least one commercial/sponsorship employee or responsibility.
kb_icp_segments.example_companies: Club Brugge, KAA Gent, GIANTX, KRÜ Esports, Team Liquid, Vitality
kb_icp_segments.pain_points: Need data to attract new sponsors, Renewal conversations need proof, Limited internal analytics resources
kb_icp_segments.priority_regions: Europe, Italy, Belgium, Germany, Spain, Netherlands, France
kb_icp_segments.target_titles: Commercial Director, Head of Partnerships, CEO (small clubs), Sponsorship Manager

kb_products.name: Sports
kb_products.description: Measure impact, engagement, and visibility to drive smarter sponsorships and maximize ROI for traditional sports rights holders, clubs, and brands.
kb_products.key_differentiators: 99% accuracy in logo detections, Tracks visual audio and text exposure, GDPR-first made in Germany, Real-time vs days/weeks for competitors
kb_products.positioning_statement: The sponsorship data that closes deals and wins renewals.

kb_products.name: Esports
kb_products.description: Track brand exposure, performance, and audience engagement across esports broadcasts, streams, and social channels.
kb_products.key_differentiators: Native esports broadcast integration, Live chat sentiment analysis, Streaming and traditional broadcast unified, Trusted by Team Liquid Vitality GIANTX MOONTON
kb_products.positioning_statement: From €115M tracked media value to deal-winning data — built for esports.

kb_products.name: Campaign
kb_products.description: Verify creator campaigns and deliverables from briefing to reporting.
kb_products.key_differentiators: End-to-end creator campaign verification, Deliverable tracking automated, Brief to report in one platform
kb_products.positioning_statement: Influencer marketing data-based, precise, and to the point.

kb_proof_points.headline: 99% accuracy in logo detections across media
kb_proof_points.full_context: AI computer vision benchmark across broadcast, streaming, and social content

kb_proof_points.headline: 40+ hrs saved on average per month with automatic reporting
kb_proof_points.full_context: Average across agency and rights holder customers who replaced manual reporting

kb_proof_points.headline: 2 employees saved on average per month in time and effort
kb_proof_points.full_context: FTE-equivalent productivity gain from automated reporting workflows

kb_proof_points.headline: €115M tracked in branded media value for MOONTON Games
kb_proof_points.full_context: Flagship case study: MOONTON Games global MLBB tournament — full multi-channel tracking

kb_proof_points.headline: GIANTX integrated 17 new brand partners using Shikenso data
kb_proof_points.full_context: Esports team used Shikenso insights in sponsor acquisition pitch decks

kb_proof_points.headline: KRÜ Esports upped fan engagement by 280%
kb_proof_points.full_context: Engagement growth tracked across broadcast and social using Shikenso platform

kb_proof_points.headline: 269% increase in sponsor ROI after switching to Shikenso
kb_proof_points.full_context: Average ROI improvement reported by brand customers vs previous measurement method

kb_proof_points.headline: 45% additional media value proved for kit sponsoring on international competition
kb_proof_points.full_context: Hidden exposure identified by Shikenso that sponsors were not previously tracking

kb_proof_points.headline: Onboarding within 48 hours of contract signature
kb_proof_points.full_context: Standard onboarding SLA — fastest in the category

kb_proof_points.headline: Made in Germany with GDPR-first foundation
kb_proof_points.full_context: Full European data standards compliance, relevant for all EU-based clients

kb_competitors.name: Blinkfire Analytics
kb_competitors.positioning_notes: Long-established sports sponsorship analytics, strongest in North American sports leagues and MLS.
kb_competitors.shikenso_differentiation: Faster reporting (hours vs days), GDPR-first European standards, Esports + Sports unified in one platform, 99% accuracy claim with audio + text + visual tracking
kb_competitors.when_likely_encountered: Established rights holders evaluating providers, especially those with existing North American ties.

kb_competitors.name: GumGum Sports
kb_competitors.positioning_notes: AI computer vision for sponsorship valuation with ad-tech roots. Strong brand recognition, enterprise-focused, premium pricing.
kb_competitors.shikenso_differentiation: Specialized in sponsorship not ad-tech, Real-time reporting vs delayed, European data standards, More transparent methodology, Esports native
kb_competitors.when_likely_encountered: Brands evaluating enterprise providers, large rights holders doing RFPs.

kb_competitors.name: SponsorPulse
kb_competitors.positioning_notes: Audience research-led sponsorship measurement using surveys and panels.
kb_competitors.shikenso_differentiation: Real exposure data vs survey-based perception, Cross-channel actual media measurement, Faster turnaround than research panels, Direct media tracking vs sentiment
kb_competitors.when_likely_encountered: Brands wanting audience research alongside ROI — often comes up in discovery calls.

kb_signal_keywords.keywords: sponsorship deal, new shirt sponsor, kit sponsor, naming rights, official partner, announces partnership
esports sponsorship, esports partnership, esports brand deal, gaming sponsorship
extends sponsorship, renews partnership, multi-year deal, extends partnership agreement
Head of Partnerships, Sponsorship Manager, Partnerships Director, VP Partnerships
Commercial Director, Chief Revenue Officer, Head of Commercial, VP Commercial
Esports Partnerships, Gaming Sponsorship, Esports Commercial, Esports Business Development

kb_copy_preferences.preference_value: partnership, partner, deal, measure, prove, show, clarity, transparency, data-backed, fact-based, renewal, retention, visibility, exposure, ROI, media value
leverage, synergy, holistic, circle back, touch base, revolutionary, game-changing, solution-oriented, paradigm, hope this finds you well, disruptive, best-in-class, world-class

Direct, peer-to-peer, sports-native. Sounds like someone who knows the industry talking to another professional who also knows it. No corporate buzzwords. Confident but never pushy. Use signal context to show I have done the homework. Maximum 3 sentences in the opener.
Lead with the signal. Reference what just happened or is about to happen. Avoid generic openers. The first line must prove I have a specific reason to be reaching out RIGHT NOW.
Soft, low-friction. Offer a 30-minute conversation, not a demo. Frame as 'show you what your data could look like'. Always include a specific time anchor (this week / next week).
